summary: Iteration 47: FeatureGate component first-time testing. All 14 test scenarios passed. Basic plan user correctly sees upgrade gate cards on all 8 locked routes. Founders plan bypasses all gates. Branch limit UI fully working. PDF report exists (211KB).

issues: Existing known issue: HTML hydration warning from <span> wrapping <th>/<tr>/<tbody> elements. Already flagged in iteration_46. Not functional but causes React hydration errors in console.

feature_verification.feature_gate_purchase_orders: PASS — data-testid='feature-gate-purchase_orders' present, shows 'Standard Plan Feature' badge, 'Purchase Orders' title, 'What You'll Unlock' section with 3 items, 'Upgrade to Standard' CTA, 'Back to Dashboard' CTA
feature_verification.feature_gate_employee_management: PASS — /employees shows gate for 'Employee & Cash Advances'
feature_verification.feature_gate_fund_management: PASS — /fund-management shows gate for '4-Wallet Fund Management'
feature_verification.feature_gate_granular_permissions: PASS — /user-permissions shows gate for 'Granular Role Permissions' with 'Pro Plan Feature' badge (indigo/purple color theme, different from Standard green)
feature_verification.cta_upgrade_to_standard: PASS — Clicking 'Upgrade to Standard' navigates to /upgrade
feature_verification.cta_back_to_dashboard: PASS — Clicking 'Back to Dashboard' navigates to /dashboard
feature_verification.founders_bypass_all_gates: PASS — sibugayagrivetsupply@gmail.com sees actual pages on all 8 locked routes: /purchase-orders, /suppliers, /employees, /reports, /audit, /fund-management, /branch-transfers, /user-permissions
feature_verification.branch_limit_counter: PASS — Basic plan user (2 branches, limit=1) sees '(2/1 used)' in red text on /branches
feature_verification.branch_limit_warning_banner: PASS — data-testid='branch-limit-warning' amber banner visible: 'Branch limit reached — Your Basic plan allows 1 branch...'
feature_verification.add_branch_disabled: PASS — data-testid='create-branch-btn' is disabled when at branch limit

action_items: MINOR (carry-over): Fix HTML hydration warning in LandingPage.js compare table — <span> wrapper around table elements (already flagged in iteration_46, no functional impact)
critical_code_review_comments: FeatureGate.js: is_super_admin bypass is correct (not role=admin). Org admins correctly see gate cards.

FeatureGate.js: isEnabled logic `!features || features[featureKey] !== false` is safe — undefined/null features defaults to enabled (no gate). This is correct behavior for plans without explicit flag restrictions.

BranchesPage.js: atLimit condition `!isUnlimited && branches.length >= maxBranches` correctly handles unlimited (0) case. Button disabled state and warning banner both tied to same atLimit variable — consistent.

App.js: All 8 feature-gated routes correctly wrapped: branch_transfers, purchase_orders (also pay-supplier), supplier_management, full_fund_management, granular_permissions, employee_management, advanced_reports, audit_center.

test_credentials.basic_plan: limittest@testmail.com / Test@123456 (2 branches, max=1, all premium features disabled)

context_for_next_testing_agent: FeatureGate component fully tested and working. All 8 gated routes show correct upgrade cards for Basic plan. Founders plan (is_super_admin) bypasses all gates. Branch limit UI (counter, warning banner, disabled button) working correctly. PDF report exists at /app/AgriBooks_SaaS_Test_Report_v2.pdf (211KB). No bugs found in this iteration. Carry-over minor issue: LandingPage HTML hydration warning (cosmetic only).
